5. DefaultCodexModelDiscovery, ResolveCodexModelAlias unexported
6. Per-harness Refresh*Async helpers for codex deleted; Step 4 scheduler drives the cadence
7. Pre-merge revert-safety check passes
8. go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass
